case_title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. WILLIAM LANTING ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LANTING, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED APR-02-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANTING, WILLIAM
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LANTING, WILLIAM
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LANTING, WILLIAM
PROOF OF SERVICE ON EX PARTE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC
ORDER STRIKING DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION ENTERED APRIL 24, 2018
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANTING, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 340 FREMONT STREET #2708, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC JUDGMENT OF APR-11-2018 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
WRIT OF POSSESSION ISSUED APR 11, 2016 AS TO REAL PROPERTY RETURNED WHOLLY UNSATISFIED AS TO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISSES FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LANTING, WILLIAM

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALS WRIT OF POSSESSION; DECLARATION OF DANIEL RILEY IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $129.36 FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC
